title: Ubiquiti UACC-ETH-SP-Panel-24 - Ethernet Surge Protector, rack-mount panel
description: Ubiquiti UACC-ETH-SP-Panel-24 is an Ethernet surge protector for indoor use in a rack-mounted design , supporting a total of 24 cables . It supports Ethernet speeds up to 10Gbps , including POE++ power delivery. Everything you need for installation is included in the package (24) Surge protectors Mounting rail (2) Rack mounts Grounding cable M4 screw (4) Screws with floating nuts (4) Self-adhesive rubber pads
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Gigabit LAN Yes
